title: Asymmetric Draped Silk Top
description: An elegant, lightweight top featuring an asymmetric drape and a breathable silk-blend fabric perfect for evening wear or elevated day looks.

title: Slim Fit Urban Wool Blazer
description: Modern tailoring meets classic style. This slim-fit blazer features sharp lapels and a stretch-wool blend for maximum comfort and mobility.

title: Minimalist Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Crafted from full-grain textured leather, this versatile crossbody bag offers clean lines, durable hardware, and spacious internal compartments.
